Request Body Fields: name (string, required), email (string, required), password (string, min 8 chars + uppercase + lowercase + digit + special), role (enum: mentor/student/admin, default: student)
Description: Register new user. OTP sent to email.
Verify OTP from email. User created in DB. Returns JWT tokens.
Login with credentials. Returns JWT tokens.
Get all available skill categories. Public API.

Request Body Fields: skillId (ObjectId from GET /skills) OR skillName (string, creates if new)
Description: Select a skill for assessment. AI generates 10 MCQs. Creates attempt record.
Same endpoint. Pass skillName instead of skillId to auto-create skill dynamically.

Request Body Fields: category (string: skill name/slug/ObjectId, required), screen: { innerWidth, innerHeight, isFullscreen } (optional)
Description: Start proctoring session. Records browser state.

Request Body Fields: eventType (string: TAB_SWITCHED / FULLSCREEN_EXITED / WINDOW_BLUR / SCREEN_RESIZED / PAGE_REFRESH / PAGE_CLOSE etc.), message (string, optional)
Description: Record a proctoring violation event. 3+ critical → auto-submit + fail.

Request Body Fields: attemptId (ObjectId, from Step 5), sessionId (ObjectId, from Step 6), answers: [ { questionId (string), selectedAnswer (string) } ]
Description: Submit answers. Grading + proctoring check. MentorProfile updated. Email queued.
Blacklist tokens in Redis. Old tokens become invalid.
Send password reset OTP to email.

Request Body Fields: email (string, required), otp (string, 4 digits), password (string, strong password)
Description: Verify reset OTP + update password.
Manually end/close proctoring session.
Get details of a specific proctoring session.
Response (Success): 200 — full session object with all events

Description: Get all proctoring sessions for logged-in user.
Proctoring analysis report — event breakdown + flags + decision.

Request Body Fields: typeWriteQuestion (string, required), query: skillIdentifier (ObjectId/slug, required), query: selectSessionTime (number, required)
Description: Student raises a doubt session. Auto-notifies matched mentors.

Request Body Fields: doubtSessionId (ObjectId, required), price (number, required), availableTime (number, optional)
Description: Mentor replies with an offer (price + time) to a student doubt.
Student selects mentor from offers. Initiates session & socket chat room.
Student manually ends active doubt session. Closes chat room.
Server health check.
